parameters.url: https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=(earthquake OR tsunami OR hurricane OR "armed conflict" OR evacuation OR "disaster relief")&sortBy=publishedAt&pageSize=10&apiKey={{ $env.NEWSAPI_KEY }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, summary: $json.summary, source: $json.source, source_url: $json.source_url, image_url: $json.image_url, severity: $json.severity, event_type: $json.event_type, latitude: $json.latitude, longitude: $json.longitude, country: $json.country, source_id: $json.source_id }) }}
